subject: Acme Corp renewal - prep for Thursday
body:
Hey Sarah,

Quick heads up — Acme renewal call is Thursday at 2pm CT. Can you pull the usage report from Salesforce and have it ready by Wednesday EOD?

Also, Tom mentioned they might want to add 50 seats. Let's come prepared with tiered pricing.

Best,
Mike

subject: Re: Q2 expansion discussion
body:
Mike,

Thanks for sending over the proposal. The team reviewed it and we're generally aligned. A few questions:

1. Can we get volume discount on the 50 additional seats?
2. What's the onboarding timeline look like?
3. Is there flexibility on the payment terms?

Let's discuss Thursday.

Best,
Tom

subject: Q1 pipeline review - Monday 10am
body:
Hi Mike,

Reminder that we have the Q1 pipeline review Monday at 10am. Please have your team's numbers updated in Salesforce by Friday.

I'd also like to discuss the BluePeak deal — it's been in negotiation for 6 weeks now. What's the blocker?

Thanks,
Lisa

subject: NovaTech demo went great
body:
Mike!

Just wrapped the NovaTech demo with Dave Wilson. He was really impressed with the API integration story. He wants to loop in their Head of Product for a follow-up next week.

I think this could close by end of March if we move fast.

- Jake

subject: BluePeak - moving forward
body:
Hi Rachel,

Wanted to follow up on our last conversation. I understand the security review is taking longer than expected. Happy to set up a call with our security team to address any concerns directly.

Would next Tuesday work for a 30-min call?

Cheers,
Mike

subject: March SDR metrics + new leads
body:
Hi Mike,

Here's the weekly SDR update:

- 47 new MQLs this week (up 12% from last week)
- 18 meetings booked
- 3 enterprise leads worth flagging: Meridian Health, Coastal Logistics, FinBridge Capital

I'll add details to Salesforce by EOD. Let me know if you want to discuss any of these.

Best,
Priya

subject: Your Helsinki Adventure Awaits! ✈️ Confirmation #AY7829104
body:
Dear Mike Astra,

Your flight to Finland is confirmed!

✈️ OUTBOUND
Austin (AUS) → Helsinki (HEL)
March 13, 2026 — Finnair AY 6142
Departure: 4:30 PM CDT
Arrival: 11:15 AM (next day) EET

✈️ RETURN
Helsinki (HEL) → Austin (AUS)
March 17, 2026 — Finnair AY 6143
Departure: 1:45 PM EET
Arrival: 6:20 PM CDT

Your booking includes:
• 1 checked bag (23kg)
• Seat selection: 14A (window)
• In-flight meals

Manage your booking at finnair.com/manage

Have a wonderful trip to Finland! 🇫🇮

subject: Hotel Kämp Helsinki - Reservation Confirmed
body:
Dear Mr. Astra,

Thank you for choosing Hotel Kämp, Helsinki's most iconic luxury hotel.

RESERVATION DETAILS:
• Check-in: March 14, 2026 (from 3:00 PM)
• Check-out: March 17, 2026 (by 12:00 PM)
• Room: Superior Room with City View
• Rate: €285/night (breakfast included)
• Confirmation: HK-2026-78291

Hotel Kämp is located in the heart of Helsinki, steps from the Esplanade Park and Senate Square.

AMENITIES:
• Complimentary WiFi
• Kämp Spa & Fitness Center
• Kämp Bar (award-winning cocktails)
• Concierge service

We look forward to welcoming you!

Warm regards,
Hotel Kämp Reservations Team
Pohjoisesplanadi 29, 00100 Helsinki

subject: Your Northern Lights Tour is Booked! 🌌
body:
Hi Mike!

Great news — your Northern Lights photography tour is confirmed!

🌌 AURORA HUNTING EXPERIENCE
Date: March 15, 2026
Time: 8:00 PM - 2:00 AM
Pickup: Hotel Kämp lobby

WHAT'S INCLUDED:
• Professional aurora guide & photographer
• Thermal suits and boots
• Hot drinks and snacks
• Transportation to prime viewing locations
• Photography tips for capturing the lights

WEATHER NOTE:
March is excellent for aurora viewing in Finland! Current forecast shows clear skies and high aurora activity (Kp index 4-5) expected.

Dress warmly — temperatures will be around -5°C to -10°C.

Can't wait to show you the magic of the Finnish night sky!

Best,
Visit Finland Tours
Booking ref: VFT-2026-4821

subject: Great meeting today
body:
Dave,

Really enjoyed the conversation today. Jake mentioned you'd like to bring in your Head of Product — we'd love that. How does next Wednesday or Thursday look?

Also, if you're ever in Austin, first round of craft beer is on me.

Cheers,
Mike

subject: Top Things to Do in Helsinki - Your Trip Guide
body:
Hi Mike,

You're going to Helsinki! Here are the top experiences travelers love:

🏛️ MUST-SEE ATTRACTIONS:
1. Suomenlinna Sea Fortress (UNESCO World Heritage)
2. Helsinki Cathedral & Senate Square
3. Temppeliaukio Church (Rock Church)
4. Market Square & Old Market Hall
5. Design District Helsinki

🍽️ FOOD & DRINK:
• Try traditional Finnish salmon soup (lohikeitto)
• Visit a Finnish sauna (it's a must!)
• Sample local craft beers at Bryggeri Helsinki
• Coffee culture — Finns drink the most coffee per capita!

📸 PHOTOGRAPHY SPOTS:
• Oodi Central Library (stunning architecture)
• Allas Sea Pool at sunset
• Kallio neighborhood street art

Enjoy your trip!
TripAdvisor Team
